final:
module RefModule(
    input signed [15:0] a,
    input signed [15:0] b,
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg signed [15:0] sum
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        sum <= 0;
    end else begin
        sum <= a + b;
    end
end

endmodule
